conventions_srcauthwithauthts_7084257490.content: Use withAuth HOC at route level rather than manual if(!user) guards inside handler bodies; guards become dead code once the HOC is applied.

thoughts_srcauthwithauthts_708426956928.content: Auth service and JWT verification error messages (e.g. 'jwt expired', 'User not found', 'Token revoked') leak internal details in 401 responses and must be sanitized to generic messages before product

facts_apimyroute_708428126420.content: Apply withAuth with optional:true to /api/my-route — optional:true permits unauthenticated access but still attaches a user if a valid token is present, useful for routes that behave differently based

facts_integration_tests_708429320091.content: Protected route test strategy: verify both unauthenticated requests (missing/invalid token) and malformed token payloads receive 401, not just one error case.
